languages.text: "Благодарю вас за это решение. Зарковцы отважны, но зря разбрасываться их жизнями нет смысла".
"Thank you for that decision. The Zarkovians are brave, but there is no sense in throwing their lives away."
languages.original_text: "Благодарю вас за это решение. Зарковцы отважны, но зря разбрасываться их жизнями нет смысла".

traits.locale_text: "Thank you for that decision. The Zarkovians are brave, but there is no sense in throwing their lives away."
"Thank you for that decision. The Zarkovians are brave, but there is no sense in throwing their lives away."
"Thank you for that decision. The Zarkovians are brave, but there is no sense in throwing their lives away."

languages.text: 「その決断に感謝します。ザルコビアンは勇敢ですが、命を捨てる意味はありません」
languages.original_text: "Thank you for that decision. The Zarkovians are brave, but there is no sense in throwing their lives away."

traits.locale_text: 「その決断に感謝します。ザルコビアンは勇敢ですが、命を捨てる意味はありません。」

languages.text: «Gracias por tomar esa decisión. Los zarkovianos son valientes, pero sería absurdo desperdiciar sus vidas».
languages.original_text: "Thank you for that decision. The Zarkovians are brave, but there is no sense in throwing their lives away."

traits.locale_text: «Gracias por tomar esa decisión. Los zarkovianos son valientes, pero sería absurdo desperdiciar sus vidas».

languages.text: “感谢您的谨慎决断。扎尔科夫人固然勇猛，但无谓的牺牲毫无意义。”
languages.original_text: "Thank you for that decision. The Zarkovians are brave, but there is no sense in throwing their lives away."

traits.locale_text: “感谢您的谨慎决断。扎尔科夫人固然勇猛，但无谓的牺牲毫无意义。”

languages.text: "Ich danke Euch für diese Entscheidung. Die Zarkovianer sind tapfer, aber es macht keinen Sinn, ihr Leben wegzuwerfen."
languages.original_text: "Thank you for that decision. The Zarkovians are brave, but there is no sense in throwing their lives away."

traits.locale_text: "Ich danke Euch für diese Entscheidung. Die Zarkovianer sind tapfer, aber es macht keinen Sinn, ihr Leben wegzuwerfen."

languages.text: "Bu karar için teşekkür ederim. Zarkovlular cesur olsa da hayatlarını boş yere harcamanın bir anlamı yok."
languages.original_text: "Thank you for that decision. The Zarkovians are brave, but there is no sense in throwing their lives away."

traits.locale_text: "Bu karar için teşekkür ederim. Zarkovlular cesur olsa da hayatlarını boş yere harcamanın bir anlamı yok."

languages.text: « Je vous remercie. Les Zarkoviens sont vaillants, mais ce n'est pas une raison pour sacrifier leurs vies inutilement. »
languages.original_text: "Thank you for that decision. The Zarkovians are brave, but there is no sense in throwing their lives away."

traits.locale_text: « Je vous remercie. Les Zarkoviens sont vaillants, mais ce n'est pas une raison pour sacrifier leurs vies inutilement. »
